response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_code : varchar
ATTR departure_date : date
ATTR departure_time : time
ATTR arrival_date : date
ATTR arrival_time : time
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR baggage_belt : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_id : varchar

ENTITY City
PK city_code
ATTR city_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_number
ATTR registration_number : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Location
PK location_id
ATTR location_id : varchar : PK

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_description : varchar

REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane_registration
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status
REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 1 : FK=location_id
REL Airport -> Location : 1 -> 1 : FK=location_id
